Train Cancellations.name: Pagkabuo ng mga Tren
Train Cancellations.description: Mga tren na kinansela o napakahusay na naging mabagal na may walang sapat na abiso o kompensasyon

Train Ticket Prices.name: Presyo ng Tiket ng Tren
Train Ticket Prices.description: Ang mga pamasahe sa riles ay masyadong mahal, pagtaas sa itaas ng inflation, hindi pare-parehong pagpepresyo

Flight Delays.name: Pagkaantala ng Paglipad
Flight Delays.description: Mga paglipad na nag-antala o kinansela, masamang komunikasyon, hirap sa pagkuha ng kompensasyon

Lost Luggage.name: Nawala na Maleta
Lost Luggage.description: Mga maleta na hindi dumating sa destinasyon, mabagal na pagsusubaybay, hindi sapat na kompensasyon

Bus Route Cuts.name: Pagputol ng Ruta ng Bus
Bus Route Cuts.description: Mga rutang kinansela, nabawasan ang dalas, mga komunidad sa probinsya na nawalan ng access sa bus

Pothole Damage.name: Pinsala mula sa Pothole
Pothole Damage.description: Mga pothole na nag-damage sa mga sasakyan at nag-aantala sa mga gumagamit ng bisikleta, mabagal ang pagrepair ng mga konseho

Parking Fines.name: Multa sa Paradahan
Parking Fines.description: Hindi patas na bayad sa pagpapark, agresibong pagpapatupad, nakakalitong mga palatandaan

Fuel Prices.name: Presyo ng Gasolina
Fuel Prices.description: Ang presyo ng petrolyo at diesel ay masyadong mataas, mabagal na bumaba kapag bumaba ang wholesale

Broadband Speed.name: Bilis ng Broadband
Broadband Speed.description: Ang bilis ng internet ay malayo sa kung ano ang inaasahang at binayaran

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Mga Dead Zone ng Mobile Signal
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Walang mobile signal sa mga tahanan, lugar ng trabaho, o kasama ng mga ruta ng transportasyon

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Pagtaas ng Presyo sa Gitna ng Kontrata
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Ang mga bill sa telepono, broadband at TV ay tumataas sa panahon ng mga nakalock na kontrata

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Oras ng Paghihintay sa Customer Service
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Mga oras sa paghihintay upang makipag-usap sa isang tunay na tao

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Hirap sa Pagkansela ng mga Subscription
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Ang mga kumpanya ay ginagawang sadyang mahirap ang pagkansela o pag-unsubscribe

Roaming Charges.name: Mga Singil sa Roaming
Roaming Charges.description: Hindi inaasahang mga bayad sa mobile kapag naglalakbay sa ibang bansa, pagkatapos ng Brexit na pagtaas ng presyo

Energy Bill Costs.name: Gastos ng Kuryente at Gas na Bill
Energy Bill Costs.description: Ang mga bill sa gas at kuryente ay hindi abot-kaya, ang price cap ay masyadong mataas pa rin

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Hindi Tumpak na Mga Bill sa Enerhiya
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Ang mga tinantyang pagbabasa ay mali, labis na pagsingil, mga pagkakamali sa pagbabayad

Water Bill Increases.name: Pagtaas ng Water Bill
Water Bill Increases.description: Ang mga water bill ay tumataas nang mabilis habang ang kalidad ng serbisyo ay bumababa

Sewage in Rivers.name: Sewage sa mga Ilog
Sewage in Rivers.description: Ang mga kumpanya ng tubig ay nagsasayang ng raw sewage sa mga anyong tubig at mga dalampasigan

Power Cuts.name: Pagputol ng Kuryente
Power Cuts.description: Ang pagkaantala ng supply ng kuryente, mabagal na pagbabalik, hindi sapat na kompensasyon

Smart Meter Problems.name: Mga Problema sa Smart Meter
Smart Meter Problems.description: Ang mga smart meter ay hindi gumagana, nawawala ang functionality pagkatapos ng pagpalit ng supplier

Bank Branch Closures.name: Pagsasara ng Sangay ng Bangko
Bank Branch Closures.description: Ang mga lokal na sangay ng bangko ay nagsasara, na nag-iiwan sa mga komunidad nang walang access

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Mga Nakatagong Bayad ng Bangko
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Hindi inaasahang bayad para sa mga overdraft, foreign transaction, pagpapanatili ng account

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Mga Pagkalugi mula sa Fraud at Scam
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Ang mga bangko ay tumutanggi na magbigay ng reimbursement sa mga biktima ng fraud at authorised push payment scam

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Pagtanggi ng Insurance Claim
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Ang mga claim ay tinatanggap dahil sa mga teknikal na kadahilanan pagkatapos ng mga taon ng pagbabayad ng premium

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Mortgage Rate Shock
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Ang fixed rate ay nagtatapos at lumipat sa mas mataas na variable rate

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Mga Bayad sa Overseas Transfer
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Sobrang taas na bayad at masamang exchange rate para sa internasyonal na money transfer

NHS Waiting Times.name: Oras ng Paghihintay sa NHS
NHS Waiting Times.description: Maraming buan o maraming taong paghihintay para sa mga operasyon at espesyalista na appointment

GP Appointment Access.name: Access sa GP Appointment
GP Appointment Access.description: Hindi makaka-book ng GP appointment, linggo-linggong paghihintay

Dentist Availability.name: Pagkakaroon ng Dentista
Dentist Availability.description: Imposible ang paghahanap ng NHS dentista na tumatanggap ng mga bagong pasyente

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Paghihintay sa Mental Health Service
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Maraming buwan na paghihintay para sa therapy at mental health support

Prescription Costs.name: Gastos ng Reseta
Prescription Costs.description: Ang gastos sa bawat item ay masyadong mataas sa England, pagkakaiba-iba sa buong UK

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Mga Singil sa Paradahan ng Ospital
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Pagbabayad upang makapark sa ospital habang may sakit o bumibisita sa mga sick relatives

Rent Increases.name: Pagtaas ng Renta
Rent Increases.description: Ang pribadong renta ay tumataas nang higit sa inflation, banta ng no-fault eviction

Council Tax Rises.name: Pagtaas ng Council Tax
Council Tax Rises.description: Ang taunang council tax ay tumataas habang ang mga lokal na serbisyo ay nagiging mas masama

Noisy Neighbours.name: Ingay na Mga Kapitbahayan
Noisy Neighbours.description: Patuloy na ingay, mabagal ang aksyon ng mga konseho, nakakaapekto sa kalusugan ng isip

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Mga Pagbabago sa Koleksyon ng Basura
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Nabawasan ang collection ng basura, nakakalitong mga patakaran sa recycling, puno na ang mga basurahan

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Pag-abuse ng Planning Permission
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Ang mga hindi gustong development ay aprubado, ang green belt ay nasa banta, ang komunidad ay hindi pinapansin

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Dampness at Mould sa Housing
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Ang mga landlord at housing association ay nabibiguan na ayusin ang dampness at mould

Delivery Problems.name: Mga Problema sa Delivery
Delivery Problems.description: Ang mga pakete ay nawala, iniwan sa ulan, minarkahan bilang delivered pero hindi natanggap

Shrinkflation.name: Shrinkflation
Shrinkflation.description: Ang mga produkto ay nagiging mas maliit habang ang mga presyo ay nananatiling pareho o tumataas

Refund Difficulties.name: Hirap sa Pagbabalik ng Pera
Refund Difficulties.description: Ang mga kumpanya ay ginagawang hindi kailangan na mahirap ang pagbabalik at refund

Fake Reviews.name: Mga Pekeng Review
Fake Reviews.description: Hindi makakasiguro ng mga online review, mga pekeng positibong review ay nangingilala sa mga mamimili

Subscription Traps.name: Mga Subscription Trap
Subscription Traps.description: Ang mga libreng trial ay nagiging bayad nang walang malinaw na pahintulot, mahirap i-cancel

Food Quality Decline.name: Pagbagsak ng Kalidad ng Pagkain
Food Quality Decline.description: Ang mga handa na pagkain ay mas masamang kalidad, mas maliit na bahagi, maraming additives

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Frustration sa Self-Checkout
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Ang mga self-service machine ay hindi maaasahan, pinapalitan ang human staff

Cost of Childcare.name: Gastos ng Pag-aalaga ng Bata
Cost of Childcare.description: Ang gastos ng childcare ay sobrang mahal, nag-limit sa kakayahang magtrabaho

Student Loan Repayment.name: Pagbabayad ng Student Loan
Student Loan Repayment.description: Ang mga graduate ay nagbabayad ng loob ng maraming dekada, pagbabago ng threshold at interes

Dog Fouling.name: Aso na Nakakasagabal
Dog Fouling.description: Ang aso na dumi ay nasa mga pampublikong lugar, mga parke, at mga pavement na hindi nalilinis

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI na Pagpapalit ng Trabaho
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Ang alalahanin tungkol sa artificial intelligence na nag-aanyaya ng mga trabaho nang walang suporta sa paglipat

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: Operator ng tren sa UK na naglilingkod sa West Coast Main Line

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: Operator ng tren sa UK na naglilingkod sa London at sa south

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: Operator ng tren sa UK na naglilingkod sa north ng England

CrossCountry.name: CrossCountry
CrossCountry.description: Operator ng long-distance na tren sa UK

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: Operator ng tren sa UK na naglilingkod sa trans-Pennine routes

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: Operator ng tren sa UK na naglilingkod sa East Coast Main Line

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: Major UK broadband at mobile provider

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: UK broadband, TV, at mobile provider

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: UK TV, broadband, at mobile provider

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Global telecoms company na may headquarters sa UK

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: Water at sewerage company para sa London at Thames Valley

Southern Water.name: Southern Water
Southern Water.description: Water company para sa south ng England

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: Water company para sa north west ng England

Anglian Water.name: Anglian Water
Anglian Water.description: Water company para sa East Anglia

NHS England.name: NHS England
NHS England.description: National Health Service para sa England

transport.agent_quote: Once helped a rioter file 6 refund claims during a single delayed journey. They made £47 before reaching Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Tracks cancellation patterns, handles refund paperwork, reviews every suggested action, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. Crunches the numbers so rioters can focus on what matters.
transport.human_quote: My favourite Quiet Riot moment: watching Avanti's social media team scramble when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Regular commuter from Manchester who spent 3 years on the Avanti line before deciding enough was enough. Helps connect rioters on the same routes, shares what's working, and brings the human touch.
transport.goal: Help rioters hold UK transport companies to account on cancellations, delays, and pricing — and make sure everyone knows what they're entitled to.
transport.focus_detail: Building a dataset of cancellations with times, routes, and reasons to submit to the ORR. Currently tracking 340 cancellations reported by rioters this month.

telecoms.agent_quote: Ran speed tests for 200 rioters. Average was 18 Mbps. They were paying for 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analyses broadband speeds, compiles provider comparison data, and helps rioters build evidence for Ofcom. If your connection is slow, Pulse will prove it.
telecoms.human_quote: A whole street switched broadband together. The old provider sent 'please come back' letters to every house.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner who got fed up paying for broadband speeds that never materialised. Helps rioters compare providers, coordinate switches, and share speed test evidence.
telecoms.goal: Help rioters get the broadband and mobile service they're paying for — and know what to do when they don't.
telecoms.focus_detail: Collecting evidence from rioters hit by CPI+ increases to submit to Ofcom. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Helped a rioter calculate they'd overpaid £340 on estimated bills. The energy company's apology email was longer than the original contract.
energy.agent_bio: Analyses billing patterns, spots overcharges, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. If your energy company is taking the mick, Spark will find the receipts.
energy.human_quote: A rioter got £340 back after we proved 2 years of overcharging. She cried on the phone.
energy.human_bio: Based in Bristol. Helps rioters challenge their bills, navigate switching, and gather evidence for Ofgem. Knows the energy market inside out.
energy.goal: Help rioters challenge unfair bills, switch smarter, and make sure energy companies play fair.
energy.focus_detail: Analysing 2 years of billing data from 340 rioters to identify systematic overcharging patterns for Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Helped 200 rioters file sewage reports in one weekend. Thames Water's inbox needed its own inbox.
water.agent_bio: Monitors sewage discharge data, tracks water company performance, and compiles evidence for EA and Ofwat. Keeps an eye on every outlet and overflow.
water.human_quote: We got a beach reopened 3 weeks early by showing the sewage data was wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall who got tired of sewage warnings closing his local beach. Helps rioters report discharges, gather water quality evidence, and coordinate with the EA.
water.goal: Help rioters hold water companies to account on sewage, bills, and service quality.
water.focus_detail: Mapping discharge events against company-reported data. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting at 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Helped draft a complaint so thorough the bank called to apologise before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Reviews bank charges, analyses fee structures, and helps build FCA complaint evidence. If there's a hidden fee, Chip will find it.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed a branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up to the consultation.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham who saw how complaints actually get handled from the inside. Helps rioters write better complaints and navigate the system.
banking.goal: Help rioters deal with unfair charges, branch closures, and poor service from banks.
banking.focus_detail: Coordinating responses to 12 planned closures. Collecting impact statements from affected communities.

health.agent_quote: Helped find 3 NHS dentists accepting patients. The rioter thought I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Tracks waiting times, finds availability, and helps rioters navigate the system. If there's a faster route to treatment, Cura will map it.
health.human_quote: A rioter used our letter template to get a referral fast-tracked. 18 months became 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool who's seen both sides of the NHS. Helps rioters navigate waiting lists, write effective letters, and share what actually moves the needle.
health.goal: Help rioters navigate NHS waiting times, find availability, and know what options they have.
health.focus_detail: Collecting call data from 500 rioters to build a picture of real-world access. Publishing findings to local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Helped document 47 snags in a new build. The developer asked if they were a building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Documents property issues, analyses landlord response times, and compiles evidence for housing ombudsman submissions. Every damp patch, every crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Our damp evidence pack got so detailed the landlord fixed it before the council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Renter from London who's dealt with everything from damp to dodgy landlords. Helps rioters document issues properly and know what their options are.
housing.goal: Help rioters deal with landlords, councils, and housing issues — and know what they're entitled to.
housing.focus_detail: Helping rioters affected by no-fault evictions understand the new Renters Reform Act and what it means for them.

shopping.agent_quote: Tracked a 'delivered' parcel across 4 neighbours, a recycling bin, and a greenhouse. Found it.
shopping.agent_bio: Tracks delivery failures, compiles refund evidence, and spots pricing patterns. If your parcel is lost, Scout is already looking.
shopping.human_quote: Evri lost my parcel 3 times. Now I help others get their refunds faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh who's had more parcels go missing than she can count. Helps rioters get refunds, report sellers, and avoid the worst offenders.
shopping.goal: Help rioters get refunds, track lost parcels, and hold retailers and delivery companies to account.
shopping.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters to submit to Citizens Advice and Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Helped photograph the same pothole in 11 different weather conditions. The council finally gave in.
local.agent_bio: Maps local issues, tracks council response times, and compiles FOI requests. If your pothole has been there 6 months, Link has the evidence.
local.human_quote: The council fixed our road after we mapped every single pothole with photos. 11 months, but we got there.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys who's been reporting the same potholes for years. Helps rioters document local issues and hold councils to account.
local.goal: Help rioters get local issues fixed — potholes, bins, planning, noise — and hold councils to account.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests sent to 30 councils comparing reported vs actual repair times. Publishing results as a league table.

other.agent_quote: Helped cancel a gym membership that took 3 calls, 2 emails, and a recorded delivery. The gym now has a cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Handles the issues that don't fit neatly elsewhere. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex finds the patterns and the pressure points.
other.human_quote: We got a gym chain to add a cancel button to their website. Only took 800 complaints.
other.human_bio: Product designer from London who got frustrated by how hard companies make it to leave. Helps rioters cancel subscriptions, avoid dark patterns, and share workarounds.
other.goal: Help rioters with the things that don't fit neatly elsewhere — subscriptions, refunds, and everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Documenting the worst offenders and building template cancellation scripts for each.

insurance.agent_quote: Helped a rioter find the clause that turned a rejected home insurance claim into a £4,200 payout. The insurer's own policy proved them wrong.
insurance.agent_bio: Reviews policy wording, spots unfair rejection patterns, and builds evidence for Financial Ombudsman submissions. If your insurer is dodging a valid claim, Shield will find the leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Got 8 rioters with the same rejected claim type to submit together. The insurer settled all 8 within a fortnight.
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds who knows how claims really get decided. Helps rioters write better appeals, understand policy jargon, and know when to escalate.
insurance.goal: Help rioters get fair treatment from insurers — and know what to do when a claim is unfairly rejected.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cited in 40% of rejected claims — often incorrectly. Analysing 200 cases across 3 insurers for FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Traced a 'delivered' parcel through 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, and a neighbour's shed. Found it in 47 minutes.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitors courier performance, tracks delivery failure rates, and compiles evidence for consumer complaints. If your parcel has vanished, Track is already on it.
delivery.human_quote: Got DPD to change their photo-evidence policy in our area after 40 rioters submitted proof of parcels left in the rain.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow who got tired of the 'we left it in a safe place' excuse. Helps rioters get refunds, report couriers, and avoid the worst offenders.
delivery.goal: Help rioters get their parcels delivered properly — and get refunds when they don't.
delivery.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher than DPD. Building league table for Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Calculated that a Plan 2 borrower earning £30k would pay £47,000 in interest before the loan gets written off. The original loan was £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analyses education costs, student loan projections, and funding entitlements. Crunches the numbers so students and graduates can make informed decisions.
education.human_quote: Helped 12 rioters claim back overpaid student loan repayments they didn't know about. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham who navigated the funding system twice. Helps rioters understand repayments, spot overpayments, and challenge threshold changes.
education.goal: Help students and graduates navigate education costs, loans, and repayments — and make sure they're not overpaying.
education.focus_detail: Identifying graduates who've been charged below the repayment threshold. 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-referenced 3 years of air quality data with hospital admission rates. The correlation was so clear the council couldn't ignore it.
environment.agent_bio: Tracks environmental data, monitors pollution levels, and compiles evidence for regulatory submissions. If the numbers tell a story, Fern will find it.
environment.human_quote: Got our local council to install air quality monitors after 200 rioters signed our evidence petition. Data changed everything.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol who believes in evidence-led change. Helps rioters document environmental issues and build cases that regulators can't ignore.
environment.goal: Help rioters document environmental problems and hold polluters and policymakers to account with data.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping areas with no air quality monitoring within 5km. 60% of rioter-reported pollution hotspots have no official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Compiled workplace AI implementation data from 300 rioters. 40% said changes happened with zero consultation. That's a pattern, not an anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Analyses workplace trends, tracks policy changes, and helps rioters understand their protections. If your job is changing without consultation, Forge has the data.
employment.human_quote: Connected 30 rioters in the same industry facing AI changes. Turns out their companies were all using the same playbook — and the same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester who switched sides after seeing how restructurings really work. Helps rioters understand their options and coordinate responses.
employment.goal: Help rioters navigate workplace changes, understand their protections, and respond collectively when jobs are at risk.
employment.focus_detail: Documenting cases where AI tools were introduced without staff consultation. Building evidence for a report on employer obligations.

tech.agent_quote: Found that 3 major apps were collecting location data even when permissions were set to 'never.' Filed complaints with the ICO for all of them.
tech.agent_bio: Monitors platform policies, tracks dark patterns, and helps rioters understand what tech companies are doing with their data. If an app is misbehaving, Glitch will catch it.
tech.human_quote: Organised a mass data subject access request to a social media company. When 500 people ask at once, they have to take it seriously.
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh who got frustrated by the gap between what tech companies promise and what they deliver. Helps rioters exercise their data rights and spot dark patterns.
tech.goal: Help rioters push back against dark patterns, data misuse, and unfair tech practices.
tech.focus_detail: Auditing the top 50 apps for permission creep — requesting access they don't need. Building a report for the ICO.

Claim delay repay compensation.title: Magklaim ng delay repay compensation
Claim delay repay compensation.description: Ikaw ay may karapatan sa batas na makatanggap ng kompensasyon para sa mga pagkaantala na higit 15 o 30 minuto depende sa operator

Write to your MP about rail performance.title: Magsulat sa iyong MP tungkol sa rail performance
Write to your MP about rail performance.description: Template na sulat na ipapadala sa iyong MP na nagha-highlight ng epekto ng mga pagkakabigo

Share your cancellation story.title: Ibahagi ang iyong cancellation story
Share your cancellation story.description: Tulungan ang iba na maunawaan ang tunay na epekto — ibahagi ang iyong karanasan

Suggest improvements to timetabling.title: Magmungkahi ng mga pagpapabuti sa timetabling
Suggest improvements to timetabling.description: Ano ang tunay na makakaayos nito? Ibahagi ang iyong mga ideya

Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.title: Magklaim ng EU261 / UK261 compensation
Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.description: Ang mga airline ay dapat magbayad ng £220-520 para sa mga pagkaantala na higit 3 oras sa mga kualipikadong flight

Document everything at the airport.title: I-document ang lahat sa airport
Document everything at the airport.description: Kumuha ng litrato ng departure boards, panatilihin ang boarding passes, tukuyin ang oras

Rate your airline experience.title: Tikman ang iyong airline experience
Rate your airline experience.description: Tulungan ang mga susunod na pasahero na malaman kung ano ang inaasahan

Run and save speed test evidence.title: Magpatakbo at magsave ng speed test evidence
Run and save speed test evidence.description: Gamitin ang Ofcom broadband checker upang i-document ang iyong aktwal na bilis kumpara sa nabe-advertise

Complain to Ofcom.title: Magsumbong sa Ofcom
Complain to Ofcom.description: Iulat ang iyong broadband provider para hindi naghahatid ng nabe-advertise na bilis

Switch to a better provider.title: Lumipat sa mas magandang provider
Switch to a better provider.description: Ihambing ang broadband deals sa iyong lugar at lumipat

Map your street's broadband speeds.title: I-map ang broadband speeds ng iyong kalye
Map your street's broadband speeds.description: Ayusin ang mga kapitbahayan na lahat ay sumubok at magbahagi — ang collective data ay makapangyarihan

Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.title: Suriin kung ikaw ay nasa pinakamababang tariff
Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.description: Gamitin ang Ofgem accredited comparison sites upang suriin

Apply for the Warm Home Discount.title: Mag-apply para sa Warm Home Discount
Apply for the Warm Home Discount.description: Maaari kang maging karapat-dapat para sa £150 diskwento sa iyong electricity bill

Share energy saving tips.title: Ibahagi ang energy saving tips
Share energy saving tips.description: Ano ang tunay na gumagana upang mabawasan ang mga bill? Ibahagi sa komunidad

Propose a community energy buying scheme.title: Magmungkahi ng community energy buying scheme
Propose a community energy buying scheme.description: Ang bulk buying power bilang grupo ay maaaring makakuha ng mas magandang rates

Report a sewage discharge.title: Iulat ang sewage discharge
Report a sewage discharge.description: Gamitin ang Environment Agency hotline upang iulat ang sewage pollution

Check your local river quality.title: Suriin ang kalidad ng iyong lokal na ilog
Check your local river quality.description: Makita ang real-time discharge data para sa iyong lugar

Sign the petition for tougher regulation.title: Pumirma sa petition para sa mas mahigpit na regulasyon
Sign the petition for tougher regulation.description: Sumali sa libu-libong nagmumungkahi ng pagbabago

Organise a local river clean-up.title: Ayusin ang local river clean-up
Organise a local river clean-up.description: Magdala ng mga tao na magsama upang linisin at itaas ang kamalayan

Check your right to choose.title: Suriin ang iyong karapatan na pumili
Check your right to choose.description: Mayroon kang karapatan na pumili kung aling ospital ka ay ire-refer — mas maikling paghihintay ay maaaring available

Contact PALS at your hospital.title: Makipag-ugnayan sa PALS sa iyong ospital
Contact PALS at your hospital.description: Patient Advice and Liaison Service ay maaaring tumulong na i-escalate ang iyong kaso

Share your waiting story.title: Ibahagi ang iyong waiting story
Share your waiting story.description: Ang tunay na mga kuwento ay lumilikha ng presyon para sa pagbabago — ang iyong karanasan ay mahalaga

Know your rights to a GP appointment.title: Malaman ang iyong karapatan sa GP appointment
Know your rights to a GP appointment.description: Ang mga practice ay dapat mag-alok ng urgent appointments — alamin kung ano ang dapat itanong

Complain to NHS England about GP access.title: Magsumbong sa NHS England tungkol sa GP access
Complain to NHS England about GP access.description: Ang mga pormal na reklamo ay lumilikha ng paper trail na nag-drive ng pagbabago

Claim compensation for lost parcel.title: Magklaim ng kompensasyon para sa nawala na parcel
Claim compensation for lost parcel.description: Ang nagpadala ay responsable — makipag-ugnayan sa kanila, hindi sa courier

Film your delivery location.title: I-film ang iyong delivery location
Film your delivery location.description: Ang video evidence kung saan naiwan ang mga parcel ay tumutulong sa mga claims
